name: HWR_ACT_ACTIVITY
description: This table stores the Simple Activities of a Wellness User

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: This column defines the id of the activity

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: source ID of the EHW source connector

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This stores the User Id to whom the Simple Activity Belongs.

columns.Name: URI
columns.Comments: This stores the URI of the simple Activity

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: This stores the time when the activity was started

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: This indicates when the activity is completed

columns.Name: ACTIVE_TIME
columns.Comments: Active time associated with user activity

columns.Name: DISTANCE
columns.Comments: Distance in miles associated with user activity

columns.Name: STEPS
columns.Comments: Step count associated with user activity

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: TIME_PERIOD
columns.Comments: This stores the Time Period of the acti

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the Custom Name of Activity being identified in this record.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
